channel.title: March on Ashish's Site
channel.description: Recent content in March on Ashish's Site

item.title: March 8: I kinda understand LLM deployment
item.author: iamashishsubedi@gmail.com (Ashish Subedi)
item.description:
Welcome aboard to my humble dlog. It’s been more than a year since my last update. A lot of new things have happened in my life, so I haven’t been able to provide updates. But here I am, working on new things, learning cool stuff, and building more than ever before, all thanks to the AI revolution.

For over a year now, I’ve been focused on my master’s study. I had some free time this month and have worked on two projects. I’ve written a detailed blog titled I kinda understand LLM deployment. Please check it out and have fun learning about all the cool things that go on under the hood during deployment. My next project is ongoing, and hopefully, you’ll hear about it soon. Until then, peace out!
